author: Casey M.
title: App shows a white screen on launch
body: Login succeeds but the page never renders. Affecting iOS Safari and Chrome desktop. Multiple users on my team reproduced it this morning.

author: Riley H.
title: Login keeps redirecting back to the sign-in page
body: I enter my email, click sign in, the magic link works for half a second, then I'm bounced back to login. Reset password didn't help.

author: @perf_alex
title: App is painfully slow on the Kanban with many cards
body: Once I have ~50 cards on the board, every page transition takes 5+ seconds. My team is talking about going back to the previous tool because of this.

author: Tatum Y.
title: Notifications are too noisy — no granular controls
body: I get pinged for every comment, mention, and tiny status change. There's no way to disable just the noisy types and keep the important ones.

author: Dev Team
title: Search returns zero results for items that clearly exist
body: I can see the card in the inbox but searching its title verbatim returns nothing. Started after last week's deploy. Likely an indexer regression.

author: Mira K.
title: Add a dark mode / night theme
body: Half my team works late and the bright UI is exhausting. Top-requested feature from designers. Even a system-followed auto toggle would be enough.

author: Sam T.
title: Export project to PDF
body: Need to share decision summaries with execs who don't have Inspira accounts. Browser print is ugly. A real server-rendered PDF download would close several deals.

author: Rae L.
title: Bulk-select with multi-row actions on the inbox
body: I have 200 inbox items to triage. Today it's 200 individual clicks. Need shift-click select-all and bulk archive/delete like every email client.

title: Mobile layout is broken on iPhone and iPad
body: Buttons run off the screen. Sidebar overlaps content in iPad portrait. Bottom nav floats wrong. Unusable on the go.

author: Avery Q.
title: Onboarding wizard is confusing
body: Got lost on step 3. The choices weren't explained. Had to ask my coworker. Add tooltips or a guided tour for new users.
